prompts.name: pre-task-context
prompts.description: Prepare an agent before a task by retrieving an ee context pack.

arguments.name: task
arguments.description: Task or question to retrieve context for

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.description: Workspace path; defaults to current directory

arguments.name: profile
arguments.description: Context profile such as balanced or compact

prompts.name: record-lesson
prompts.description: Turn a durable lesson into an explicit ee remember workflow.

arguments.name: lesson
arguments.description: Durable rule, fact, failure, or convention to remember

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.description: Workspace path; defaults to current directory

prompts.name: review-session
prompts.description: Review a prior session and propose curation candidates.

arguments.name: session
arguments.description: CASS session path or ID; defaults to most recent

arguments.name: workspace
arguments.description: Workspace path; defaults to current directory

arguments.name: propose
arguments.description: Whether to ask for curation proposals

resourceTemplates.name: ee memory show
resourceTemplates.description: Read a memory record through ee memory show --json

resourceTemplates.name: ee context pack
resourceTemplates.description: Assemble a task-specific context pack through ee context --json

resourceTemplates.name: ee schema export
resourceTemplates.description: Read a public schema definition through ee schema export --json

resourceTemplates.name: ee agent docs topic
resourceTemplates.description: Read an agent docs topic through ee agent-docs --json

result.description: Turn a durable lesson into an explicit ee remember workflow.

content.text:
Record a durable ee lesson only if it is supported by evidence from the current work.

Lesson:
Run cargo fmt --check before release.

Recommended command:
`ee --workspace . --json remember --level procedural --kind rule "Run cargo fmt --check before release."`

Apply these comma-separated tags if they are supported by the evidence: cargo,release.
Do not invent provenance. If the lesson came from a failure or decision, include the source session, command, file, or bead in the memory text before recording it.

params.reason: caller no longer needs the response

error.message: notifications/cancelled must be sent as a JSON-RPC notification without id
Write tool ee_remember requires allowWrite=true when dryRun=false
Prompt arguments must be an object
